title: Deduplicate Retrieved Chunks
description: Remove near-duplicate chunks before injecting into the prompt.
problem: Write deduplicate(chunks, threshold=0.9) that removes chunks whose text content overlaps by more than threshold with an already-kept chunk. Use simple word overlap (Jaccard similarity) to measure overlap.
hint: Keep a list of accepted chunks. For each new chunk, only add it if its Jaccard similarity with all accepted chunks is below threshold.

test_cases.label: No duplicates kept
test_cases.call: len(deduplicate(['the cat sat','the cat sat on mat'],0.5))
